slides.title: The *best predictor* of a long life isn't your weight.
slides.sub: It is your cardio fitness, your VO2 max. The good news: almost anyone can raise it.

slides.title: Meet your VO2 max
slides.body: It is how well your body uses oxygen. Low fitness carries *a bigger risk* than smoking or diabetes.

slides.title: Fitness buys you years
slides.body: Going from low to even average fitness is linked to *a dramatic drop* in early death. The first gains are biggest.

slides.title: Most days, go easy
slides.body: Long, easy efforts build your aerobic base. Keep a pace where you can *still hold a conversation*.

slides.title: Once a week, go hard
slides.body: Short, hard intervals lift your ceiling. A few *all out minutes* a week move the number.

slides.title: Just keep moving
slides.body: Walk, cycle, swim, take the stairs. Consistency beats intensity, and *every bout counts*.

slides.title: Train the number that *adds years*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks your movement and steps and turns your whole day into one simple score.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
The single best predictor of how long you'll live isn't your weight. It's your cardio fitness. 🫀

Build your VO2 max with easy 'zone 2' movement most days, plus a little hard effort weekly. Almost anyone can raise it. 🔖

Vibe Health tracks the movement that moves your number → link in bio.
youtube_title: The Fitness Number That Predicts Your Lifespan
